---
name: "✨ Feature Request"
about: "Propose a new feature or improvement"
title: "[FEATURE]: "
labels: "enhancement"
assignees: ""
---

## 💡 Feature Description
A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like.

## 🎯 Problem It Solves
What problem does this feature address? Who benefits from it?

## 📐 Proposed Solution
How do you envision this working? Be as specific as possible.

- **API changes**: New endpoints or modified signatures
- **CLI changes**: New flags, subcommands, or output formats
- **Configuration**: New settings or environment variables

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered
What other approaches have you thought about? Why did you choose this one?

## 📝 Notes for AI Agent
_(Optional)_ Implementation hints, relevant code areas, or constraints for automated development agents.

## ✅ Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Tests and documentation updated
